posts.title: Well Merith is fully operational, soon more stream awareness and  orchestration layer for better decision making and more.
posts.summary: Well Merith is back up and running, so we can proceed with further integrations, like stream awareness and building the orchestration layer for better decision making and other background process handling.

posts.title: I made the blog entries worked and fix a glaring issue
posts.summary: I realised I almost allowed for duplicate tiles to fuck up the system due to url conflicts.
posts.content_html:
I made it work, and spotted a potential issue.

This is gud.

This blog lets me also just vlog via the embedded video link, so that will be nice. 😅

Have a gud one ppl.

posts.title: First post
posts.content_html: Woo, if you can see this, it works! Hell yeah!
